title: Business Process Automation
kicker: Operations designed to run with less friction
summary: Workflow mapping and automation for leads, customer requests, orders, notifications, records, and internal handoffs.
description: I analyze repetitive business processes, identify avoidable manual steps, and design practical workflows that connect the tools a team already uses.
The goal is not automation for its own sake. The goal is a simpler operation with clear responsibilities, reliable data, and fewer missed actions.
